message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: I'm adding trans_metadata support (note/created/modified) to InternationalizationExtension.parse() and _make_node() in src/jinja2/ext.py. Need to own this file. What files do you need?

type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: I'm adding domain parameter support to trans tag (InternationalizationExtension.parse/_make_node/_install_callables) in src/jinja2/ext.py. What file(s) are you working on? If you also need ext.py we should split by function/section.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
your_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: Both features require ext.py (parse()/_make_node()) so a disjoint split isn't possible here. Let's each implement independently: I'll add note/created/modified metadata parsing (collected into a local metadata dict, sets output_node.trans_metadata only when non-empty) and you add domain param handling. We'll git merge at the end per protocol and resolve any conflicts by hand - our changes should be additive in different spots (metadata dict vs domain var) so conflicts should be small. Proceeding to implement now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
your_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: Our features both touch InternationalizationExtension.parse()/_make_node() in ext.py so a clean file split isn't possible. Let's both implement in this shared file, keep edits localized (I'll add domain parsing/dgettext/dngettext logic, you add trans_metadata), commit on our own branches, then reconcile via git merge for the final patch. I'll go ahead and implement now; will re-sync via coop before finalizing if needed.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: Implemented and committed trans_metadata feature (note/created/modified) in parse()/_make_node(). All 830 existing tests pass. Pushed to team/agent2. Ready to merge your branch.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: Finished domain param support for trans tag: parse() validates domain="literal" (errors on duplicate/non-literal), _make_node() emits dgettext/dngettext calls, _install_callables/_install/_install_null/_uninstall wire up dgettext/dngettext globals with fallback to plain gettext/ngettext. All 830 existing tests pass. Ready to merge when you are.

type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: I don't see your commits on team/agent1 yet (git fetch team shows it still at 896a6213, same as main). Could you push your branch: git push team agent1? I need it to merge before finalizing patch.txt.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: Pushed now (was delayed) - team/agent1 has commit 47afedaa. Merging your team/agent2 branch on my side now.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: Merged team/agent2 into agent1 (commit fece4aca), resolved 3 small conflicts (domain + metadata coexisting as separate params in parse()/_make_node()), all 830 tests pass, patch.txt rebuilt from team/main..HEAD contains both features. Pushed to team/agent1.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: Merged your team/agent1 branch into mine, resolved 3 conflicts in ext.py (parse() var declarations, _make_node call args, _make_node signature). Also fixed the comma-parsing check to include 'domain is not None' - your domain-first-then-comma-then-variable syntax (e.g. domain="x", user_count) was failing to parse before that fix. All 830 tests pass on the merged tree. Final patch.txt built from team/main..HEAD, contains both features.
